omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
You will be asked to consent to the following:
• photos/storage: to collect the photos that you wish to upload and display to other users, or train our Al
algorithm (photos will be uploaded to our back-end server)
• Microphone: to input texts via voice input feature
• Internet access: to view WLAN state and network connections to optimize Internet access by cellular
network status camera: to take photos and/or videos for your questions identity: to link to and enable
login through a third-party account (e.g., Google or Apple)
• precise geolocation: to train our Al algorithm
• Contacts: to provide an easy way for you to screen if any of your contact persons are using PolyBuzz,
and establish connections within PolyBuzz
